concerns: Unified inspect assertions intentionally define the future T020 contract and currently fail at command dispatch before payload-shape assertions run.
The current inspect-port compatibility surface still uses legacy inspect-port next actions; the new unified inspect tests require launchdeck inspect port:<port> safe actions once implemented.
recovery_hints: Wire the inspect command in src/cli.js and delegate target parsing for port:<port>, pid:<pid>, and task:<alias:task>.
Return the contract fields under data while preserving envelope mirrors: target, classification, project, task, run, ports, listeners, ownership, conflicts, safeActions, and blockedActions.
Keep external listeners inspect-only: safeActions must not include stop, force-stop, kill, or restart for external/unknown ownership; blockedActions should explain those refused actions.
Preserve inspect-port compatibility; the green compatibility test should continue to pass while inspect-port can delegate to inspect port:<port>.
